data.title: What's Going On With Bank Of America (BAC) Shares
data.description: Bank of America shares are trading flat week, though near 52-week highs. The company reported a strong Q3 fiscal 2024 net income of $6.9 billion.

Dogecoin's Price Increased More Than 11% Within 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Dogecoin's (CRYPTO: DOGE) price has risen 11.79% to $0.14. This continues its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 23.0% gain, moving from $0.11 to its current price. As it stands right now, the coin's all-time high is $0.73.
